ticket: I was charged twice this month and your support team has not replied for five days. I am going to post this on social media if this is not fixed today.
justification: Billing issue combined with escalation threat and angry tone, requires immediate attention to prevent reputational damage.

ticket: The export button stopped working after your latest update. Our reporting team is blocked.
justification: Technical bug blocking access to a critical feature, impacts business operations, and requires prompt resolution.

ticket: Can you add approval workflows before invoices are submitted?
justification: Feature request to enhance workflow efficiency, not blocking, but has potential ROI and change-management implications, warrants consideration.

ticket: We need confirmation that our customer data is not being used to train your AI models.
justification: Compliance concern with potential regulatory implications, requires prompt attention to ensure data governance and adherence to privacy standards.

ticket: My admin account is locked and the password reset email never arrives.
justification: Account access issue, polite tone, and no escalation threat, but requires timely resolution to prevent administrative disruptions.
